generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T AMMONIUM BENZOICUM. Chemical formula , C 7 H 5 O(NH 4 )O. Preparation for use , Solution in water. Authority. Wibmer's provings, two to twenty grains in solution. ► Increased frequency of the pulse. ► Increased mucous secretion in the larynx, causes frequent hawking and spitting. ► Increased warmth in the stomach, slight. ► Slight discomfort in the stomach. ► Pain across the sacrum, with urgency to stool. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main
Clinical: Albuminuria; Dropsy; Gout; Indigestion; Ranula; Rheumatism
Swelling under tongue, r. side, like ranula. Increased mucus in larynx causes frequent hawking and spitting.

Right : swelling under tongue ; soreness in kidney. Soreness : and swelling in eyes ; in region of r. kidney ; between abdominal rings, in spermatic cord. Increased warmth and discomfort in stomach. Pain : across sacrum. Albuminuria. Gout with fluid in great toe-joint or with lithates. TOUCH. PASSIVE MOTION. INJURIES. [45] [Am. be.]. Pressure : against seat of carriage ; soreness in kidney.

face.text: Bloated, swollen eyelids. Swelling under tongue like ranula

urinary.text: Smoky, scanty. Albuminous and thick deposits

Sensation of internal soreness on pressure in leaning the back against the cushioned back of a carriage in region of r. kidney. Bloated face, eyelids swollen, head heavy, stupid; urine scanty smoky. (Albuminuria.). Urine smoky-looking, scanty, strong-smelling.

Sensation of internal soreness on pressure in leaning back against cushioned back of carriage, in region of right kidney. Bloated face, eyelids swollen, head heavy, stupid ; urine scanty, smoky. θ Albuminuria.

back.text: Pain across sacrum, with urgency to stool. Soreness in region of right kidney
Pains across sacrum, with urgency to stool. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main.
Pain across sacrum with urgency to stool. Soreness in region of right kidney when pressing back against seat of carriage.

keynotes.text: color="#800000">AMMONIUM BENZOICUM Benzoate of Ammonia One of the remedies for albuminuria, especially in the gouty. Gout, with deposits in joints. Urinary incontinence in the aged.

The chief symptoms of this salt (which has been proved) are: Head heavy, stupid. Urine scanty; smoky. Pight kidney sensitive to pressure. Gout with fluid in great toe-joint or with lithates. The right side is most affected.

KEY-NOTES TO THE MATERIA MEDICA by HENRY N. GUERNSEY, M.D. Presented by Médi-T AMMONIUM BENZOICUM One of the remedies I think of, at once, in Albuminuria . Head and Face.-- Eyelids swollen. Face bloated. Head heavy, stupid. Urine.-- Sensation of soreness in region of the right kidney on leaning that part against a chair-back or cushion. Urine scanty, and looks smoky. Copyright © Médi-T 2000

_raw: It is similar in its action to the Ammonias and to Benzoic acid. Also to Gnaphal. (gouty concretions), Caustic., Tereb., Urtica.
Similar to its relatives, the ammonia salts and Benz. ac., especially the latter in gout, rheumatism and kidney affections, and the Amm. phosph., in gouty deposits
Also similar to : Gnaphal. (gouty concretions) ; Caustic. ; Tereb., (smoky, albuminous urine ; rheumatism)

eyes.text: Feeling of swelling and soreness, apparently in the puncta and saccus lachrymalis. Lids swollen.
Feeling of swelling and soreness, apparently in puncta and saccus lachrymalis. Eyelids swollen. θ Albuminuria.

stomach_abdomen.text: Eructation of food without acidity, with apparent weakness of digestion, or acid eructations. Increased warmth in stomach.

Eructation of food without acidity, with apparent weakness of digestion, or acid eructations. Increased warmth in stomach. Slight discomfort in stomach. Sensation of soreness between abdominal rings, in spermatic cord, and extending slightly downward.

mouth_throat.text: Swelling under tongue, right side, like ranula.

stool_rectum.text: Pain across sacrum with urgency to stool.

respiratory.text: VOICE AND LARYNX. TRACHEA AND BRONCHIA. [25] [Am. be.]. Increased mucous secretion in larynx, causes frequent hawking and spitting.
